MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LAKHAL, MAHER AS TO DEFENDANT AHMED, SID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAKHAL, MAHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHMED, SID $700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY SID AHMED IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $100.00 OR MORE ON THE 15TH OF EVERY MONTH, COMMENCING OCTOBER 15, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LAKHAL, MAHER
NOTICE OF REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT BY INSTALLMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
MOTION - GRANTED SENT TO PLAINTIFF MAHER LAKHAL RETURNED. "ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD."

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAKHAL, MAHER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
